Asha Venkatesan
Growth engineer
asha@example.com +1 415 555 0139 github.com/ashav San Francisco, CA

Engineer across growth and data for 8 years; shipped experiment platforms used by 40+ teams and revenue systems processing $120M/yr. Looking to own growth engineering end-to-end at an early-stage B2B company.

Experience

Staff Engineer, Growth — Northbeam 2023-02 → present
Growth platform team of 6; owned experimentation and activation surface
  • Rebuilt experiment assignment across 40 teams, cutting setup from days to 15 min and doubling test volume
  • Shipped onboarding rework across 3 product lines, lifting week-1 activation +18% and unlocking PLG motion
  • Led 4-engineer squad through pricing-page relaunch; conversion +9%, adding $2.1M ARR run-rate
Senior Engineer — Reva Commerce 2019-06 → 2023-01
  • Built checkout event pipeline over 6 sources at 30k events/s, enabling same-day merchandising decisions
  • Cut p95 storefront latency 70% by moving personalization to the edge, worth +4% conversion in holdout
  • Mentored 5 engineers; 3 promoted to senior within two cycles
Engineer — Arlo Labs 2017-08 → 2019-05
  • Shipped referral system to 1.2M users; drove 22% of new signups by year two
